name_en: Sunshine Small Tote, full cowhide leather, with tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Features a spacious lined interior compartment, matching leather trim, and gold-tone hardware. Equipped with two handles and a detachable shoulder strap, for hand or shoulder carry. Model: 7122,
